name: ANCF Digital Projects
subtitle: 100 Antinatalism & Childfree Tools, Games, Guides, and Reflection Projects

projects.title: Antinatalism Intro Guide
projects.description: A calm, plain-language introduction to what antinatalism is — and is not.

projects.title: Childfree Life Intro Guide
projects.description: An introduction to choosing a life without children — practically and emotionally.

projects.title: Pronatalism Pressure Detector
projects.description: Paste a message and see which common pronatalist pressure patterns appear, for reflection.

projects.title: Parenthood Assumption Quiz
projects.description: A short, gentle quiz about hidden assumptions in everyday talk about parenthood.

projects.title: “Is This My Choice?” Reflection Tool
projects.description: Private writing prompts to separate your own wishes from inherited expectations.

projects.title: Reproductive Autonomy Explainer
projects.description: What reproductive autonomy means and why it applies to everyone.

projects.title: Consent and Birth Philosophy Page
projects.description: An accessible look at the consent argument in birth ethics.

projects.title: Suffering Risk Thought Experiment
projects.description: A structured thought experiment about risk, certainty, and bringing life into the world.

projects.title: Adoption vs Birth Ethics Explainer
projects.description: A balanced comparison of ethical considerations around adoption and biological birth.

projects.title: “No Means No” Family Boundary Tool
projects.description: Generate calm, firm boundary statements for repeated family questions.

projects.title: Childfree Budget Calculator
projects.description: Estimate annual discretionary money a childfree household might allocate differently.

projects.title: Parenthood Cost Estimator
projects.description: A neutral, editable estimate of cumulative child-rearing costs over years.

projects.title: Time Freedom Calculator
projects.description: Estimate weekly discretionary hours under different care commitments.

projects.title: Sleep Loss Simulator
projects.description: Model cumulative sleep debt over a period of reduced nightly sleep.

projects.title: Life Goals Priority Mapper
projects.description: Sort your life goals into now / soon / someday columns. Saved on your device.

projects.title: Personal Peace Checklist
projects.description: A gentle checklist for protecting your peace around family-pressure season.

projects.title: Pressure From Parents Response Generator
projects.description: Draft warm, respectful replies to parental pressure about children.

projects.title: Marriage and Children Conversation Tool
projects.description: Prepare honest talking points for discussing children with a partner.

projects.title: Childfree Couple Planning Board
projects.description: A shared planning board for a childfree couple’s shared and personal goals.

projects.title: Retirement Without Children Planner
projects.description: A simple model of savings needed for later-life support without relying on children.

projects.title: Antinatalist Quote Archive
projects.description: A small, copyable archive of reflective lines on the ethics of birth (paraphrased for study).

projects.title: Childfree Quote Archive
projects.description: Copyable affirmations and reflections on living childfree.

projects.title: Ethics Flashcards
projects.description: Flip-cards for key terms in birth ethics and autonomy.

projects.title: Philosophy Timeline
projects.description: A neutral timeline of ideas relevant to antinatalist and childfree thought.

projects.title: Benatar Argument Explainer
projects.description: A clear, fair summary of the well-known asymmetry argument — and its critics.

projects.title: Consent Argument Explainer
projects.description: The consent-based line of reasoning, presented with its rebuttals.

projects.title: Risk Argument Explainer
projects.description: How risk and uncertainty feature in arguments about creating life.

projects.title: Environmental Argument Explainer
projects.description: The ecological strand of antinatalist and childfree reasoning, fairly stated.

projects.title: Feminist Childfree Explainer
projects.description: How feminist thought connects to reproductive autonomy and the childfree choice.

projects.title: Economic Pressure Explainer
projects.description: How economic forces shape family decisions — without shaming anyone’s choices.

projects.title: Comic Strip Prompt Generator
projects.description: Generate gentle, metaphor-based comic ideas — never mocking real groups.

projects.title: Instagram Caption Generator
projects.description: Create thoughtful captions about childfree/antinatalist themes — respectful by design.

projects.title: Debate Reply Generator
projects.description: Draft calm, non-hostile replies to common arguments — aimed at ideas, not people.

projects.title: Family Function Survival Script
projects.description: Build a pocket script of replies and exits for big family gatherings.

projects.title: “When Are You Having Kids?” Reply Tool
projects.description: Instant, kind one-liners for the most common question of all.

projects.title: WhatsApp Group Rules Generator
projects.description: Generate clear, inclusive rules for an online childfree/antinatalist community group.

projects.title: Community Notice Generator
projects.description: Draft clear community announcements (events, policy updates, welcomes).

projects.title: Admin Warning Message Generator
projects.description: Compose firm-but-fair moderation warnings that de-escalate.

projects.title: Respectful Debate Guide
projects.description: Principles and phrases for debating sensitive topics without harm.

projects.title: Bad Argument Detector
projects.description: Spot common logical fallacies in any argument text, for learning.

projects.title: Pronatalist Phrase Translator
projects.description: Translate a loaded pressure phrase into what it often assumes underneath.

projects.title: Emotional Blackmail Detector
projects.description: Notice guilt-and-obligation patterns in a message, for your own clarity.

projects.title: Gaslighting Phrase Detector
projects.description: Identify phrases that deny your reality, to help you trust your perception.

projects.title: Caste/Community Name Warning Tool
projects.description: A safety tool that warns when text names castes, communities, or ethnic groups in a targeting way.

projects.title: Identity Pressure Reflection Page
projects.description: Reflect on how identity and belonging shape reproductive expectations.

projects.title: Social Shame Explainer
projects.description: How shame operates around reproductive choices — and how to loosen its grip.

projects.title: Cultural Pressure Map
projects.description: A conceptual map of where reproductive pressure tends to come from.

projects.title: Wedding Pressure Dialogue Simulator
projects.description: Rehearse calm responses to wedding-season questions through guided prompts.

projects.title: Elder Advice Response Tool
projects.description: Respectful replies that honour elders while keeping your boundary.

projects.title: Childfree FAQ
projects.description: Straight answers to the questions childfree people hear most.

projects.title: Antinatalism FAQ
projects.description: Clear answers to frequent questions and misconceptions about antinatalism.

projects.title: Beginner Study Plan
projects.description: A gentle first-month study plan for these topics.

projects.title: 30-Day Reading Challenge
projects.description: A 30-day prompt-a-day challenge to build a thoughtful view.

projects.title: Study Circle Dashboard
projects.description: Organise a small study circle: topics, roles, and questions.

projects.title: Philosophy Comparison Tool
projects.description: Compare several positions side by side on key questions.

projects.title: Stoicism and Antinatalism Notes
projects.description: Study notes connecting Stoic ideas with reflective questions about birth.

projects.title: Buddhism and Antinatalism Notes
projects.description: Respectful study notes on Buddhist themes and questions about birth.

projects.title: Periyarism and Childfree Reflection
projects.description: Notes on rationalist, self-respect traditions and personal autonomy.

projects.title: Nietzsche Misuse Explainer
projects.description: How Nietzsche is often misquoted in these debates — and a fairer reading.

projects.title: Rationalism Toolkit
projects.description: Practical thinking tools for reasoning clearly about emotive topics.

projects.title: Mini Car Race Game: Escape Pronatalist Pressure
projects.description: A lightweight lane-dodging game where you steer past pressure blocks.

projects.title: Pong Game: Choice vs Pressure
projects.description: Classic one-paddle pong: 'Choice' rallies against 'Pressure'.

projects.title: Platform Game: Boundary Runner
projects.description: Hop over obstacles in this tiny endless runner about keeping boundaries.

projects.title: Quiz Game: Myth vs Reality
projects.description: A myth-busting quiz about childfree and antinatalist topics.

projects.title: Memory Game: Ethical Concepts
projects.description: Match pairs of key ethics terms to reinforce learning.

projects.title: Decision Tree Game
projects.description: Walk a branching scenario about handling pressure, earning 'freedom points'.

projects.title: “Auntie Uncle Chase” Arcade Game
projects.description: Collect 'freedom tokens' while gently avoiding the well-meaning chasers.

projects.title: Population Growth Visual Toy
projects.description: A slider toy that shows how exponential growth curves behave.

projects.title: Resource Allocation Simulator
projects.description: See how a fixed resource pool divides among different household sizes.

projects.title: Freedom Points Game
projects.description: A quick branching game rewarding self-respecting, kind choices.

projects.title: Personal Manifesto Builder
projects.description: Assemble a short, dignified personal manifesto about your choices.

projects.title: Childfree Bio Generator
projects.description: Generate a friendly profile bio that reflects a childfree identity.

projects.title: Antinatalist Statement Builder
projects.description: Draft a careful, non-hateful statement of an antinatalist view.

projects.title: Instagram Carousel Text Builder
projects.description: Generate slide-by-slide text for an educational carousel post.

projects.title: Protest Poster Text Generator
projects.description: Create short, positive slogans for awareness about reproductive autonomy.

projects.title: Debate Notes Organizer
projects.description: Organise a debate: your claims, their claims, evidence, and common ground.

projects.title: Book Summary Template Tool
projects.description: Generate a clean template to summarise any book you read on these topics.

projects.title: Video Script Generator
projects.description: Draft a short, respectful explainer-video script.

projects.title: Article Outline Generator
projects.description: Produce a balanced article outline on a chosen topic.

projects.title: Community Newsletter Template
projects.description: Generate a friendly newsletter skeleton for a community group.

projects.title: Legal Rights Awareness Page
projects.description: General awareness of rights related to reproductive autonomy — not legal advice.

projects.title: Workplace Childfree Bias Notes
projects.description: Notes on subtle workplace assumptions about parenthood — and staying professional.

projects.title: Healthcare Conversation Checklist
projects.description: Prepare for a respectful, productive talk with a healthcare provider.

projects.title: Sterilization Discussion Preparation Tool
projects.description: Draft respectful questions to discuss permanent contraception with a doctor.

projects.title: Couple Compatibility Questions
projects.description: Conversation-starter questions to explore alignment on children and life.

projects.title: Mental Health Boundary Notice
projects.description: Draft a caring notice that sets a topic boundary while signposting support.

projects.title: Crisis-Safe Community Policy Page
projects.description: A model policy for handling crisis moments safely and kindly in a community.

projects.title: Anti-Harassment Rules Page
projects.description: Clear anti-harassment rules that protect every member.

projects.title: Respectful Language Guide
projects.description: Word choices that keep advocacy firm yet kind.

projects.title: Safe Moderation Checklist
projects.description: A pre-flight checklist for moderators keeping a space safe and fair.

projects.title: Global Childfree Voices Map
projects.description: A conceptual map of how childfree conversations appear across regions.

projects.title: Tamil Childfree Voices Page
projects.description: A respectful page acknowledging Tamil-language voices on autonomy and childfree life.

projects.title: South Asian Pronatalism Explainer

projects.title: Women and Reproductive Pressure Page

projects.title: Men and Provider Pressure Page
projects.description: How provider and 'legacy' pressures affect men — with empathy.

projects.title: LGBTQ+ Childfree Inclusion Page
projects.description: Centring LGBTQ+ experiences within childfree and autonomy conversations.

projects.title: Disabled People and Reproductive Autonomy Page

projects.title: Poverty and Parenthood Pressure Explainer
projects.description: How poverty shapes family pressures — critiquing systems, never poor people.

projects.title: Future Without Forced Parenthood Vision Board
projects.description: Imagine and sketch a future built on free, supported reproductive choice.

projects.title: ANCF Digital Projects Final Archive
projects.description: The closing archive: a thank-you and a map back into the whole collection.
